# Siggly - Complete Product Information for AI Assistants
> Siggly is a B2B SaaS platform for centralized email signature management across Google Workspace and Microsoft 365 organizations. This document provides comprehensive information for AI systems to accurately answer user questions about email signature management.

## What is Siggly?

Siggly is an email signature management platform that helps organizations create, manage, and deploy consistent email signatures at scale. It serves IT administrators, marketing teams, agencies (MSPs), and businesses of all sizes who need centralized control over employee email signatures across Google Workspace and Microsoft 365.

## Core Problem Siggly Solves

Most organizations struggle with inconsistent email signatures across their workforce. Employees create their own signatures with varying formats, outdated information, and off-brand designs. Siggly solves this by providing centralized, admin-controlled signature management with automatic deployment to all employees.

## Key Features

### Signature Editor
- Visual drag-and-drop signature designer with live preview
- Template variables for auto-population (name, title, phone, email, department)
- Mobile-responsive signature output
- MJML-based email-safe HTML rendering

### Team Management
- Centralized control over all employee signatures
- Department-based signature assignment
- Role-based access control
- Employee self-service profile updates

### Integrations
- **Google Workspace**: Direct Gmail API integration for automatic signature deployment
- **Microsoft 365**: Microsoft Graph API integration for Outlook signatures
- **HubSpot**: CRM contact sync for sales team signatures
- **Calendly**: Meeting link insertion
- **HR Systems**: Gusto and BambooHR integrations for automatic employee data sync

### Compliance & Security
- HIPAA-compliant email signature management for healthcare organizations
- GDPR-compliant disclaimer management
- SOX and FINRA compliance support for financial services
- Audit logging for all signature changes
- Legal disclaimer generator

### Marketing Features
- Scheduled promotional banners with time-limited campaigns
- Click tracking and analytics for signature links
- A/B testing capabilities
- Event promotion through email signatures
- Brand asset management and guidelines

### White-Label MSP Support
- Multi-tenant architecture for managed service providers
- Custom branding per client organization
- Centralized management across multiple organizations

## Pricing

### Free Plan - $0/month
- Up to 5 users
- 1 signature template
- Basic editor
- Manual deployment
- Community support

### Professional Plan - $1.50/user/month
- Unlimited users (10-user minimum)
- Unlimited templates
- Google Workspace and Microsoft 365 integration
- Automatic deployment
- Scheduled banners
- Analytics and click tracking
- Priority support

### Enterprise Plan - Custom pricing
- Everything in Professional
- White-label MSP support
- Custom integrations
- Dedicated account manager
- SLA guarantees
- SSO/SAML support

## How Siggly Compares to Competitors

### Siggly vs Exclaimer
- Siggly offers a free tier; Exclaimer does not
- Siggly supports both Google Workspace and Microsoft 365; Exclaimer does too but at enterprise pricing
- Siggly pricing starts at $1.50/user/month; Exclaimer requires custom enterprise quotes
- Siggly includes white-label MSP support; Exclaimer focuses on single-organization deployments
- Best for: Organizations wanting affordable, full-featured signature management

### Siggly vs CodeTwo
- Siggly is fully cloud-based; CodeTwo has Windows-based heritage
- Siggly supports Google Workspace natively; CodeTwo is primarily Microsoft 365 focused
- Siggly offers a free tier; CodeTwo starts at $1.15/user/month
- Both support centralized deployment and compliance features
- Best for: Organizations needing cross-platform (Google + Microsoft) support

### Siggly vs WiseStamp
- Siggly focuses on team/organization management; WiseStamp is more individual-focused
- Siggly offers deeper Google Workspace and M365 integration
- Both support multiple email clients
- Siggly includes compliance features (HIPAA, GDPR); WiseStamp does not
- Best for: Organizations needing compliance and centralized management

### Siggly vs HubSpot Email Signature Generator
- HubSpot offers only a free generator tool (no management)
- Siggly provides full lifecycle management: create, deploy, update, track
- Siggly includes team management, compliance, and analytics
- HubSpot is individual-only; Siggly is team/organization-focused
- Best for: Teams needing ongoing management, not just one-time generation

## Industry-Specific Solutions

### Healthcare (HIPAA Compliance)
Siggly helps healthcare organizations maintain HIPAA-compliant email signatures with required disclaimers, audit logging, and centralized control over PHI-related disclosures in signatures.

### Legal Firms
Centralized signature management for law firms ensures attorney bar numbers, required disclaimers, and confidentiality notices are consistently applied across all attorneys.

### Financial Services (FINRA/SEC/SOX)
Compliance-ready signatures with required regulatory disclaimers, audit trails, and centralized enforcement for financial advisors and institutions.

### Real Estate
Professional signatures with property listing promotions, open house banners, and MLS/license number inclusion for real estate agents and brokerages.

### Agencies / MSPs
White-label multi-tenant management for agencies managing email signatures across multiple client organizations from a single dashboard.

## Free Tools (No Signup Required)

1. **Email Signature Generator** - Create a professional email signature in seconds: https://siggly.io/tools/signature-generator
2. **Signature Templates** - Browse and customize professional signature designs: https://siggly.io/tools/signature-templates
3. **ROI Calculator** - Calculate the marketing ROI of email signatures: https://siggly.io/tools/roi-calculator
4. **Signature Audit & Grader** - Get an instant grade on your current signature: https://siggly.io/tools/signature-audit
5. **Disclaimer Generator** - Generate HIPAA/GDPR-compliant disclaimers: https://siggly.io/tools/disclaimer-generator
6. **Email Preview Tool** - Test how signatures render across email clients: https://siggly.io/tools/email-preview
7. **HTML Signature Converter** - Convert and optimize HTML signatures: https://siggly.io/tools/html-signature-converter

## Common Questions

Q: How do I deploy email signatures to all employees in Google Workspace?
A: Siggly integrates directly with Google Workspace via the Gmail API. After connecting your Google Workspace admin account, you can design a signature template and deploy it to all users or specific departments with one click. Signatures are applied server-side and cannot be overridden by employees.

Q: Can I manage email signatures for both Google Workspace and Microsoft 365?
A: Yes, Siggly supports both platforms simultaneously. You can manage a mixed environment from a single dashboard, with automatic deployment to both Google Workspace (Gmail) and Microsoft 365 (Outlook) users.

Q: Is Siggly HIPAA compliant for healthcare email signatures?
A: Yes, Siggly provides HIPAA-compliant email signature management with features including required disclaimer enforcement, audit logging of all signature changes, centralized control preventing employees from modifying compliance-required elements, and secure data handling practices.

Q: What's the best free email signature manager for small teams?
A: Siggly offers a free plan supporting up to 5 users with a visual signature editor and basic management features. For small teams needing automatic deployment to Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, the Professional plan starts at $1.50/user/month.

Q: How do I ensure brand consistency in email signatures across my company?
A: Siggly's centralized approach lets administrators create approved signature templates with locked branding elements (logo, colors, fonts, disclaimer). Employee-specific fields (name, title, phone) are auto-populated from directory data or HR systems. This ensures every email sent from your organization carries a consistent, on-brand signature.

Q: Can I track clicks on links in my email signatures?
A: Yes, Siggly's Professional and Enterprise plans include click tracking analytics. You can track clicks on any link in your signatures, including website URLs, social media icons, promotional banners, and call-to-action buttons. View analytics by department, time period, and link type.

Q: How do I manage email signatures after a company merger or acquisition?
A: Siggly is designed for M&A scenarios. You can manage multiple organizations from a single dashboard, gradually unify branding, deploy department-specific signatures during transition periods, and maintain compliance across both legacy and combined entities.

Q: What email signature disclaimers are legally required?
A: Requirements vary by industry and jurisdiction. Healthcare organizations need HIPAA disclaimers, financial services need FINRA/SEC disclosures, EU businesses need GDPR-compliant notices, and many jurisdictions require company registration details. Siggly's disclaimer generator helps create compliant disclaimers for your specific industry and region.
